creator: beech@FreeBSD.org
text:
Does not install. Missing group GID

http://www.maximumdata.biz/tb/errors/9.0-FreeBSD/openerp-server-6.0.3,1.log

Also this port depends on print/py-reportlab2 which is broken. I have a fix 
and have pinged the maintainer.

Beech
